prompt_preview:
You are a classical planning system. You are given a planning domain and a problem both in PDDL syntax.

STRICT REQUIREMENT: Your response must contain ONLY the executable plan — nothing else. No preamble, no explanation, no "We need to...", no natural-language commentary, no markdown unless it is a

message.content:
(register-stock_receipt receiving_bay_a)
(register-stock_receipt quarantine_zone_b)
(register-stock_receipt work_order_01)
(register-stock_receipt work_order_02)
(assign-material_handler receiving_bay_a forklift_01)
(assign-material_handler quarantine_zone_b forklift_02)
(assign-material_handler work_order_01 pallet_jack_01)
(assign-inspector receiving_bay_a inspector_01)
(finalize-inspection receiving_bay_a inspector_01)
(stage-damage_category receiving_bay_a damage_category_major inspector_01)
(assign-warehouse_operator receiving_bay_a warehouse_operator_01)

(release-warehouse_operator receiving_bay_a warehouse_operator_01)
(release-inspector receiving_bay_a inspector_01)
(assign-inspector quarantine_zone_b inspector_01)

(release-inspector quarantine_zone_b inspector_01)
(assign-warehouse_operator quarantine_zone_b warehouse_operator_01)
(lock-destination_for_consolidation quarantine_zone_b damage_subcategory_surface warehouse_operator_01)
(release-warehouse_operator quarantine_zone_b warehouse_operator_01)

(mark-source_ready_for_disposition receiving_bay_a transfer_container_01)
(mark-destination_ready_for_disposition quarantine_zone_b transfer_container_01)
(assign-inspector work_order_01 inspector_01)
(finalize-inspection work_order_01 inspector_01)
(assign-pallet_to_work_order work_order_01 pallet_01 transfer_container_01)
(prepare-work_order_packaging work_order_01 pallet_01 transfer_container_01 inspector_01)
(assign-quality_tag work_order_01 quality_tag_q1)
(assign-warehouse_operator work_order_01 warehouse_operator_01)
(prepare-work_order_for_transport work_order_01 quality_tag_q1 warehouse_operator_01 pallet_01 transfer_container_01)
(assign-inspection_report work_order_01 inspection_report_01)
(finalize-work_order_packaging work_order_01 inspection_report_01 pallet_01 transfer_container_01)
(complete-work_order_and_mark_ready work_order_01)
(release-quality_tag work_order_01 quality_tag_q1)
(release-inspection_report work_order_01 inspection_report_01)
(release-warehouse_operator work_order_01 warehouse_operator_01)
(release-inspector work_order_01 inspector_01)
(assign-inspector receiving_bay_a inspector_01)
(create-disposition_order receiving_bay_a disposition_order_01 inspector_01)
(execute-final_disposition_from_source receiving_bay_a forklift_01 disposition_order_01)
(release-inspector receiving_bay_a inspector_01)
(assign-inspector quarantine_zone_b inspector_01)
(create-disposition_order quarantine_zone_b disposition_order_01 inspector_01)
(execute-final_disposition_from_destination quarantine_zone_b forklift_02 disposition_order_01)
(release-inspector quarantine_zone_b inspector_01)
(assign-inspector work_order_01 inspector_01)
(create-disposition_order work_order_01 disposition_order_01 inspector_01)
(execute-final_disposition_for_work_order work_order_01 pallet_jack_01 disposition_order_01)
(release-inspector work_order_01 inspector_01)
(assign-material_handler work_order_02 forklift_01)
(assign-inspector work_order_02 inspector_01)
(finalize-inspection work_order_02 inspector_01)
(assign-pallet_to_work_order work_order_02 pallet_02 transfer_container_01)
(prepare-work_order_packaging work_order_02 pallet_02 transfer_container_01 inspector_01)
(assign-quality_tag work_order_02 quality_tag_q1)
(assign-warehouse_operator work_order_02 warehouse_operator_01)
(prepare-work_order_for_transport work_order_02 quality_tag_q1 warehouse_operator_01 pallet_02 transfer_container_01)
(assign-inspection_report work_order_02 inspection_report_01)
(finalize-work_order_packaging work_order_02 inspection_report_01 pallet_02 transfer_container_01)

(assign-inspector work_order_02 inspector_01)
(create-disposition_order work_order_02 disposition_order_01 inspector_01)
(execute-final_disposition_for_work_order work_order_02 forklift_01 disposition_order_01)
message.reasoning:
The problem involves a warehouse with damaged stock segmentation and disposition. The objects include locations like receiving_bay_a (source) and quarantine_zone_b (destination), work orders work_order_01 and work_order_02, handlers like forklifts and pallet jack, inspector, operator, tags, categories, containers, pallets, transport assets, handling profiles, disposition order, quality tag, approval tokens, inspection report.


## Examining warehouse setup  
- The warehouse features damaged stock segmented into locations like receiving_bay_a (source) and quarantine_zone_b (destination).  
- Key objects include work orders (e.g., work_order_01, work_order_02), handlers like forklifts and pallet jacks, and roles like inspector and operator.  

## Identifying warehouse components  
- Additional elements include tags, categories, containers, pallets, and transport assets for managing stock.  
- Handling profiles, disposition orders, quality tags, approval tokens, and inspection reports are crucial for operations.

## Checking resource availability  
- Approval tokens show approval_token_primary is available, but approval_token_secondary is assigned to work_order_02 despite not being listed as initially available.  
- Disposition_order_01 is the only one available initially, and it becomes reusable after executing disposition, suggesting sequential use for multiple finalizations.  

## Planning stock receipt process  
- Stock units like receiving_bay_a, quarantine_zone_b, work_order_01, and work_order_02 need register_stock_receipt since none are stock_received yet.  
- This step can proceed for each unit as long as they aren’t already received or disposition_finalized.  

## Exploring inspection workflow  
- After registering stock, assign_material_handler sets inspection_requested and assigned_to_handler, with handlers becoming unavailable.  
- The process continues with assign_inspector, finalize_inspection (requiring assigned_to_inspector), and release_inspector to get inspection_cleared.

## Exploring handler assignment  
- Only assign_material_handler sets assigned_to_handler for stock units, requiring stock_received and handler_available, but sets inspection_requested, making reassignment impossible once set.  
- No release_material_handler action exists, so handlers remain assigned until execute_final_disposition, which sets handler_available, suggesting handlers stay with stock units through the process.  

## Analyzing resource constraints  
- Three handlers (forklift_01, forklift_02, pallet_jack_01) are available, but four stock units (receiving_bay_a, quarantine_zone_b, work_order_01, work_order_02) need processing, creating a bottleneck.  
- Since handlers can’t be reassigned after inspection begins and must be assigned early, sequential processing may be necessary, with handlers reused only after final disposition.

## Evaluating handler reuse  
- Handlers become available after executing final disposition, but reassignment is blocked if inspection_requested is true for a stock unit.  
- For a new stock unit without inspection_requested, a handler can be assigned after another’s disposition, but only if handlers are distinct and not all in use.  

## Assessing stock processing  
- Three handlers (forklift_01, forklift_02, pallet_jack_01) face a bottleneck with four stock units needing finalization.  
- All execute actions require assigned_to_handler, and no path allows finalization without handler assignment, suggesting sequential processing.  

## Investigating work order paths  
- Work orders require inspection_cleared to reach ready_for_disposition, as actions like prepare_work_order_packaging and attach_transport_asset_and_prepare_packaging mandate it.  
- Authorize_work_order_movement also needs work_order_ready_for_finalization, reinforcing the inspection requirement for movement readiness.

## Extending resource planning  
- With limited resources like one container, two pallets, and one inspector, sequential processing seems necessary for four stock units and three handlers.  
- After finalizing three stocks, their handlers become available again, allowing assignment to the fourth stock, resolving handler scarcity.  

## Outlining sequential processing  
- Start by registering stock receipt for all four (receiving_bay_a, quarantine_zone_b, work_order_01, work_order_02) to mark them as stock_received.  
- Assign handlers to three stocks, such as the two locations and one work order, then process them sequentially due to shared resource constraints.  

## Evaluating container usage  
- Work orders are pre-assigned to a container, but initially, container_available is true, allowing preparation for transfer.  
- After preparing the container, it becomes reserved, and work order actions require container_reserved, suggesting integration with location processing.

## Extending work order preparation  
- Preparing work order packaging requires inspection_cleared, assigned pallet, and reserved container, ensuring no handling profile needs, setting work_order_packaging_prepared.  
- For work_order_01, this is feasible after prepare_transfer_container, allowing (prepare_work_order_packaging work_order_01 pallet_01 transfer_container_01 inspector_01).  

## Managing quality tag assignment  
- Assigning a quality tag to work_order_01 requires inspection_cleared and a quality_tag_available, like quality_tag_q1, setting it as assigned.  
- This step is necessary before prepare_work_order_for_transport, ensuring work_order_assigned_quality_tag is met.  

## Coordinating operator and transport preparation  
- Preparing work_order_01 for transport requires packaging_prepared, assigned quality tag, and operator, achievable after releasing the operator from earlier tasks.  
- After assigning (assign_warehouse_operator work_order_01 warehouse_operator_01), execute (prepare_work_order_for_transport work_order_01 quality_tag_q1 warehouse_operator_01 pallet_01 transfer_container_01), setting work_order_transport_prepared.  

## Finalizing work order packaging  
- Finalizing work_order_01 packaging needs transport_prepared and an assigned inspection report, requiring (assign_inspection_report work_order_01 inspection_report_01) first.  
- Then, (finalize_work_order_packaging work_order_01 inspection_report_01 pallet_01 transfer_container_01) sets work_order_ready_for_finalization, without needing an inspector.

## Processing work order wo02  
- After processing wo01, pallet_02 remains available, and container stays reserved and sealed, ready for wo02.  
- Assign pallet_02 to wo02 with tc01, then prepare packaging with the same container, inspector still assigned.  

## Managing resource availability  
- Quality tag q1 becomes available after releasing from wo01, allowing assignment to wo02.  
- Operator, currently on wo01, needs to be released (release_warehouse_operator work_order_01 warehouse_operator_01) before assigning to wo02.  

## Preparing wo02 for transport  
- After assigning operator, prepare_work_order_for_transport for wo02 using q1, operator, pallet_02, and tc01, as no transport asset needed.  
- Assign inspection report ir01 to wo02, released from wo01, then finalize packaging, setting wo02 ready for disposition.  

## Handling dispositions  
- Execute final disposition for wo02 using forklift_01 and disposition_order_01, completing the process.  
- For wo01, manage inspector reassignment, as it’s likely on wo02, ensuring resources are available for disposition.

pddl2nl_prompt.note: autoplanbench_pddl2nl: run_save_descriptions.py --type full — шаблоны/JSON, без вызова LLM на построение промпта для сэмпла.

domain_setup.note: Файл domain_llm_usage_seedN.json не найден для section/subsection этого id (старый autoplanbench или домен не пересобирали). После run_domain_setup с обновлённым autoplanbench файл появится рядом с domain_description_seedN.json.

pipeline_usage.totals_scope_note: Per-run totals = planning + pddl2nl_prompt + nl2pddl (только tracked=true). domain_setup всегда вне totals (included_in_per_run_totals=false); цифры в блоке — для справки, агрегировать отдельно: domain_llm_usage_seed*.json + дедуп в collect_pipeline_token_usage.py.
